name: TallyBench — Everyday Calculators
description: 49 free calculators covering finance (loan, mortgage, refinance, car loan, rent vs. buy, tax, paycheck, salary, sales tax, CD, retirement, net worth, savings goal, debt payoff, GST/VAT, SIP/investment), health (BMI, calorie/BMR, macros, pregnancy, ovulation, ideal weight), education (GPA, grade, scientific, fraction, statistics), and everyday math (time, random number).
